'''鈭歞h-s-p-z''' ('''kadhaspezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yede|yede]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-p-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yede|yede]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-s-p-z
|-
! Lemma
| kadhaspezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhaspezoko|thidhaspezoko]] || [[word:jidhaspezoko|jidhaspezoko]] || [[word:shidhaspezoko|shidhaspezoko]] || [[word:kidhaspezoko|kidhaspezoko]]

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhaspezoko|th忙dhaspezoko]] || [[word:j忙dhaspezoko|j忙dhaspezoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhaspezoko|sh忙dhaspezoko]] || [[word:k忙dhaspezoko|k忙dhaspezoko]]

|-

|-

|}
